description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses node:latest as the default Docker image and defines three stages: build, analysis, and deployment. In the build stage add a job named build that runs `npm install`, then `npm run build`, then `echo "$CI_JOB_ID" >job_id.txt`, caches the node_modules/ directory, and publishes the public/ and job_id.txt paths as artifacts. In the analysis stage add a job named sonarqube that uses the ciricihq/gitlab-sonar-scanner image, sets SONAR_ANALYSIS_MODE=publish, SONAR_PROJECT_VERSION=$CI_BUILD_ID, SONAR_URL=https://sonar.atte.fi, and executes `unset CI_BUILD_REF && /usr/bin/sonar-scanner-run.sh`. In the deployment stage add a job named deploy_production that runs only on the master branch, uses the buildpack-deps:curl image, targets the production environment at http://bt.insecure.fi/, and runs a curl command `curl --fail --silent --show-error --data-urlencode "commit=$CI_COMMIT_SHA" --data-urlencode "build_job=$(cat job_id.txt)" --data-urlencode "deploy_job=$CI_JOB_ID" --data-urlencode "secret=$DEPLOY_SECRET" 'https://atte.fi/update_bt_desktop.py'` to trigger the external deployment.
